# emailAddress

**Instance Property**

The value the framework returns for a match on an email address.

## Declaration

```swift
let emailAddress: String
```

## Properties that describe an email address

- **label**: A value the framework returns that may contain a value suitable to populate a label when creating a contact.

items.description: A value the framework returns that may contain a value suitable to populate a label when creating a contact.
